title: OnlineVeilingMeester Monitor Input
description: Search profile and notification config for auction lot monitoring.

profile_name.title: Profile name
profile_name.description: Identifier for this search profile, used in log labels and KV store keys.

keywords.title: Keywords (lot title match — any one must match)
keywords.description: List of keyword strings. A lot title must contain at least one keyword (case-insensitive) to be considered. Example: ["Dell OptiPlex", "HP EliteDesk", "ThinkCentre"]

processor_keywords.title: Processor keywords (any one must match title or description)
processor_keywords.description: List of processor strings that pass the CPU filter. Include all tiers you accept. Example: ["i5", "i7", "i9"] for i5-or-better. Use ["i7", "i9"] for i7-only. Leave empty to skip processor check.

ram_min_gb.title: Minimum RAM (GB)
ram_min_gb.description: Minimum RAM in GB. Lot must mention this amount or higher. Set to 0 to skip RAM check.

require_ssd.title: Require SSD / NVMe storage
require_ssd.description: If true, lot must mention SSD, NVMe, or M.2. Lots mentioning only HDD are excluded.

require_power_adapter.title: Require power adapter
require_power_adapter.description: If true, lot must explicitly mention a power adapter/charger (Dutch: voeding, lader, adapter). Silence = exclusion.

exclude_if_spec_unconfirmed.title: Exclude lot if any required spec is not mentioned
exclude_if_spec_unconfirmed.description: When true (default), a lot is excluded if a required spec (e.g. power adapter) is simply not mentioned. When false, missing specs are treated as unknown/pass.

max_bid.title: Maximum bid (€)
max_bid.description: Lots with a current bid above this amount will not trigger notifications. Set to 0 to disable the bid cap.

suppress_above_max_bid.title: Suppress notifications when bid exceeds max
suppress_above_max_bid.description: If true (default), no notification is sent when current bid > max_bid. If false, notifications fire regardless of bid.

notify_minutes_before_end.title: Stage 2 reminder: minutes before auction end
notify_minutes_before_end.description: How many minutes before lot end time to fire the Stage 2 bid reminder. Default: 60 minutes.

notifications.title: Notification channels
notifications.description: Configure Telegram and/or WhatsApp (CallMeBot) notification delivery.

base_url.title: Base URL
base_url.description: Base URL of the auction site. Change only if the domain changes.

language.title: Site language
language.description: Language prefix to use when constructing URLs. 'nl' for Dutch.

crawl_delay_seconds.title: Crawl delay between requests (seconds)
crawl_delay_seconds.description: Delay between page requests to respect robots.txt. Minimum 10 as per site policy.

max_auctions_to_scan.title: Max auction sessions to scan per run
max_auctions_to_scan.description: Safety cap on auction sessions visited per run. 0 = no limit.
